creator: jason@zx2c4.com
text:
This was fixed this week in wireguard-kmod, wireguard-go, and wireguard-tools:

https://git.zx2c4.com/wireguard-freebsd/commit/?id=8801509656e955c27ebf4b9b3e39fbf717bb0367
https://git.zx2c4.com/wireguard-go/commit/?id=12ce53271baa04a8a8a2c491e1604c53d5f05cfb
https://git.zx2c4.com/wireguard-tools/commit/?id=163cef8b9013898bbe0d0b8d4afd25264e999858

These changes are in the latest ports packages. So please let me know if they work for you and especially if you notice unexpected regressions.
